Text[1]: Ye can hear beasts a-rustlin' there of late. “Geshunpest,” the 'venturers call 'em, but best to leave well enough alone...

Text[0]: You seem a decent sort, and I would love nothing more than to tell you about a number of profitable ventures...but I'm not at liberty to do so without the express permission of Geimlona in Idyllshire.
You seem a decent sort, but perhaps not privy to certain more profitable ventures. If you're interested, you'd do well to seek out Morgayne in Idyllshire.
Minazuki has asked me to help look after the children, but they are generally so well behaved there is not much for me to do.
Minazuki has asked me to help look after the children, but they are generally so well-behaved there is not much for me to do.
We're being very hardworking and well behaved, I promise! After all, if we don't train properly, we'll never be as good as you!
We're being very hardworking and well-behaved, I promise! After all, if we don't train properly, we'll never be as good as you!

I meant it when I said we were boldly goin' where no tradesperson's gone afore...an' I ain't quittin' before the end. With proper preparations and a bit o' determination, we'll be pioneerin' a brand new age o' trade in no time.

I meant it when I said we were boldly goin' where no tradesperson's gone afore...an' I ain't quittin' before the end. With proper preparations and a bit o' determination, we'll be pioneerin' a brand-new age o' trade in no time.
No sooner did we receive word of attacks in Mamook than we deployed reinforcements. I pray we can count on your assistance until the situation in Yak T'el is resolved.
Sareel Ja has yet to utter a word since his capture. Perhaps the reality of the situation has begun to sunk in.
It's all well and good that Sareel Ja was apprehended, but who's to say someone else won't try and misuse these echoes?
Have you met these fine fellows, Masters Pawlin and Hamlyn? One a lover of chickens, one a worshipper of tonberries─both spirits kindred in their devotion!
Have you met these fine fellows, Masters Pawlin and Hamlyn? One a lover of chickens, one a worshiper of tonberries─both spirits kindred in their devotion!
Welcome, Player. I'm so pleased you came to see us!
Text[1]: Usosuke and the others adore their new posing skills, showing them off to all and sundry! Why, I'm having as much fun watching them as our patrons are.
Text[2]: It warms my heart to know their good cheer has made such a profound and positive impression. May they lift your spirits as well!

Text[0]: Pip pip pip! Prrr, pip!
Player! 'Tis a relief to find you taking a well-earned respite for once.
Text[1]: The Gold Saucer exudes resplendence... One could scarcely find this sort of atmosphere in Doma. Fresh experiences like these make our journey here all the more worthwhile.
Text[2]: I shall remember the sight well─crowds young and old, immersed in the endlessly festive ambience... It shall serve as a useful reference while we rebuild.

Text[0]: Greetings, Player. Lord Hien and I are journeying across the city-states, surveying their ways of life as we go.
Text[1]: We intended only a brief stop at the Gold Saucer, but...we did not expect to find the venue teeming with such a charming bunch of Nagxian otters.
Text[2]: ...There is no harm in staying a while longer, surely.

Text[0]: Do you love MGP? Then you best get yourself over to the Gold Saucer and make the most of the fifty percent bonus rewards on offer during this season's limited-time event! Did I mention it's only for a limited time!?

Do you love MGP? Then you best get yourself over to the Gold Saucer and make the most of the fifty percent bonus rewards on offer during this season's limited-time event! Did I mention it's only for a limited time!?

Do you love MGP? Then you best get yourself over to the Gold Saucer and make the most of the fifty percent bonus rewards on offer during this season's limited-time event! Did I mention it's only for a limited time!?
Seeing so many folk learning how to enjoy the sea─safely, mind!─and leave the faire tired and happy...it warms the heart. As grand chaperone, I couldn't ask for more.
Text[1]: Above all, we've shown our guests they can trust the Adventurers' Guild to look after them. You can expect to be even busier! Haha!

Text[0]: I'm always glad to introduce people to the ocean, but more than anything, I just love seeing the faire full of smiling faces.
Text[1]: Thanks again for your help! If you're itching to take another cruise yourself, I imagine plenty more guests will be looking for an escort.

Text[0]: Thanks again for escorting us earlier. I didn't want to admit it in front of Lho, but I was pretty nervous myself.
Text[1]: Once I heard that the Adventurers' Guild would send someone to protect us, I worked up the courage to sign us up. And I'm so glad I did!
Text[2]: I'll tell everyone in Gridania what a fantastic time we had. And we'll definitely be back for the next Moonfire Faire!

Text[0]: Cannons! Slides! Cocktails! Oh, everything looks so frightening!
Text[1]: Although...everyone seems to be having fun, even hurtling through the air or plunging into the ocean. They must really trust the adventurers to keep them safe.
Text[2]: ...If you don't try, you'll never know! I-I'll give anything a go!!! ...As long as Eavan comes too!

Text[0]: Fancy seein' you here, Player! Surprised to find old Donuhanu so far from home, eh?
Text[1]: Pashenine's got quite the appetite─of the metaphorical and literal sort─for addin' fish to his repertoire. So we got to wonderin'...what might we find in the waters beyond Tural?
Text[2]: The northern seas we passed through were like nothin' I've ever seen, but these warm, clear waters remind me of home. Just goes to show: there's plenty more seas to fish! Gahaha!

Text[0]: Player! I trust you've been well? Donuhanu and I have journeyed across the ocean in search of rare and unusual fish.
Text[1]: As well you know, my mastery of piscatory phantasms relies on consuming fish in their entirety.
Text[2]: Thankfully, the ship's galley agreed to cook up any fish we might bring them. I am indebted to the kind culinarians of this land─and their fine fish dishes!

Text[0]: Why, if it isn't Player! I heard the juices over here are quite spectacular, so Halnaruk and I are visiting for a little research.
Text[1]: The La Noscean orange juice has been a particular revelation, I must say. Thirst-quenching and a source of essential vitamins, it's the ideal drink for hot climes. Especially under such intense sun!
Text[2]: It's surprising to find a fruit with similar benefits to cherimoya across the salt. My scales aren't itchy at all! This venture has given me much to consider, indeed...

Text[0]: Pfff... Pfffkohhh... Halnaruk sees how Xeerol Ja's eyes sparkleshine as she siptastes new juicymixes.
Text[1]: Yes, this suncoast boasts much for a juicekeep to study! Shockingly versed in tastyfresh juicymixes, these lowlanders are.
Text[2]: ...Or should Halnaruk say “uplanders”? After saltcrossing, Halnaruk stumblefound those much like Mobbies who tongueflap in curious ways. The world has many surprises, even for a professional stuffseeker!

Text[0]: Well now...I was rather hoping to avoid running into any acquaintances. It's a little embarrassing to be found aboard a ship bearing your own name, wouldn't you say?
Text[1]: Though it's flattering, really. It's an honor to have one's name associated with such a place of joy─one I can't rightly say I deserve.
Text[2]: Yet I am gladdened to think my time on stage left such a legacy. That *this* should be how I am remembered... Forgive me, I must be growing sentimental with the years!

Text[0]: Heat getting you down? Float on over to Costa del Sol for beachside relaxation at the Moonfire Faire!
